case_title: NOE VALLEY COMPUTERS VS YOUNG COMMUNITY DEVELOPERS INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG COMMUNITY DEVELOPERS INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $670.99 FILED BY NOE VALLEY COMPUTERS AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG COMMUNITY DEVELOPERS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NOE VALLEY COMPUTERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOUNG COMMUNITY DEVELOPERS INC. $670.99 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $720.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-03-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF DEC-07-1995 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
